_description: Bulgarian greengrocer fiscal receipt (СТАСИ, Plovdiv), 29.06.2026. Hard case that motivated the under-read fix: dual EUR/BGN totals, running 'МЕЖД. СУМА' subtotals, one 'КОРЕКЦИЯ' void, qty-x-unit printed above the product name. Line items + grand total are in EUR; the BGN total (27.03 @ 1.95583) must be ignored. The model previously misread 3 prices low (1.22->0.97, 0.23->0.21, 0.62->0.49) so items summed 13.42 vs the printed 13.82.
_image: Drop the receipt photo here as receipt.jpg (gitignored — it's personal data).
_subtotalNote: No labelled SUBTOTAL line is printed (the last 'МЕЖД. СУМА' equals the total because prices are VAT-inclusive), so subtotal 0 or 13.82 are both acceptable — not asserted.
_voidedNote: The 0.294 x 5.50 = 1.62 'Плодове' line is cancelled by КОРЕКЦИЯ and must NOT appear as an item.
